items.title: Consumer Confidence Dips Slightly In August
items.description: The Conference Board's Consumer Confidence Index dipped slightly in August, falling 1.3 points to 97.4.

items.title: Dollar Index Outlook: What's Driving The U.S. Dollar After Powell's Friday Remarks? (Technical Analysis)
items.description: The US dollar has been in a weird trading zone since the contradicting NFP report from the beginning of the month and the strong PPI report that has shown the appearance of tariff effects.

items.title: Nvidia Q2 Preview: 'Saying This Is The Most Important Stock In The World Is An Understatement' (CORRECTED)
items.description: Experts break down the key numbers and items to watch in Nvidia's second quarter earnings.

items.title: The Fed's Coming Stagflation Trap
items.description: Stagflation risk is rising. Read how investors should navigate the volatility created by economic turmoil.

items.title: Fed's Reverse Repo Is Finally Drained
items.description: The Fed's Overnight Reverse Repo Facility (RRP) has plummeted from a $2.5T peak in late 2022 to just $22B, nearly empty. Read the full analysis about what this means for investors here.
